title: Slovakian Pate Stuffed Salmon
description: A flavorful Slovakian-inspired salmon dish filled with a rich pate, perfect for a dinner party.
instructions: Season the salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
In a small bowl, mix together the Slovakian pate, butter, and garlic.
Place a tablespoon of the pate mixture onto the center of each salmon fillet.
Top each fillet with a sprinkle of fresh dill.
Fold the salmon in half to enclose the filling.
Place the stuffed salmon on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the salmon is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork.
